message: Just like he said, the next day was peaceful, and the day after that, and the day after that... They were all peaceful days.
After that day, all the bullying stopped.
Not only Akasaka-san and Kitami-san, but the rest of the class stopped looking at us so coldly as well.
Though Akasaka-san and Kitami-san kept avoiding us.
Mamiya-kun acted normally after the incident as well.
One thing did bother me, though...
Mamiya-kun was the person from before. He wasn't the Mamiya-kun who protected us.
He was the kind, sociable person... The one who seemed to light up the world.
He never again showed me the same expression from that night.
Actually... this happened, too.

name: Zakuro
message: "Uh, this... is the book I borrowed from you. Thank you very much. I shouldn't have kept it so long."

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? Oh, really?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Huh?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Oh, sorry, sorry... I guess I forgot that I'd lent it to you. Ahaha, I thought I'd lost it."

name: Zakuro
message: "Really?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Ahaha... Sorry, I have a really bad memory. I always forget stuff like that."

name: Zakuro
message: "...So you're 'laying low' again?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Eh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, nothing. You told me you talk like that when you're 'laying low'..."

name: Mamiya
message: "Huh? What are you talking about?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, uh, it's nothing."

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, and what about the others... How are the other two triplets?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Triplets?"

name: Mamiya
message: "I don't know any triplets... The twins seem to be getting along fine, though."
Twins?
Who are they?
I don't remember Mamiya-kun talking about twins before...

name: Zakuro
message: "You've really changed, haven't you?"

name: Mamiya
message: "Have I?"
From the Mamiya-kun I last met here on the rooftop...
From the Mamiya-kun I met in that underground room...
And even from the Mamiya-kun I first met here on the rooftop... This one was different from them all.
The peaceful days will continue on... Maybe that's why Mamiya-kun wants to keep acting like that incident never happened...
Maybe that's why the Mamiya-kun from that time doesn't show himself...
The days when Kimika and I fought against Akasaka-san and Kitami-san... and the night in the park where it all ended...
Maybe it really is an unnecessary past for the peaceful days of the present...
Maybe that's true for Mamiya-kun, too...
There were always bad rumors about him floating around before, but now his reputation is getting better. He's cheerful, and his grades are good, and people like him...
People seem more open to me and Kimika as well, since we were friends with Mamiya-kun before this happened...
Kimika just seems troubled by the attention, though, since she doesn't get along with people very well.
But, mysteriously enough, Kimika's aloof attitude actually made people like her more.
Now that I think of it, she was always cute... She's no good at sports, but she's pretty smart, too.
There was never any reason for so many people to dislike her.
Bullying is just like that...
There doesn't need to be a good reason... Depending on the circumstances, sticking out can either cause someone to be bullied or cause them to be adored.
As Mamiya-kun's reputation changed, so did ours...
But eventually, the popular Mamiya-kun grew distant from us.
Peaceful days.
Ongoing peaceful days...

name: Kimika
message: "Were you thinking about Mamiya Takuji again?"

name: Kimika
message: "Seems like you haven't talked to him lately, huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah... Or rather, it doesn't feel like I can talk to him. He's so popular..."

name: Kimika
message: "What happened... He was always so awkward before, but now he's completely different."

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah... You might be right..."

name: Kimika
message: "You like him, don't you?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahaha... You're still saying that?"

name: Kimika
message: "B-But..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Dummy..."
I took her hand.

name: Zakuro
message: "Do you want to skip class?"

name: Kimika
message: "Eh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Let's skip..."

name: Kimika
message: "B-But..."

name: Zakuro
message: "But what?"

name: Kimika
message: "Z-Zakuro, that's kind of..."
Kimika's face went bright red...
I pulled her hand...

name: Kimika
message: "Wait, uh... Zakuro, that's kind of bold..."
I grabbed my bag and pulled her hand...

name: Kimika
message: "Ah, I have to get my bag too..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ha, ha, ha..."

name: Kimika
message: "Ha, ha, ha... Z-Zakuro!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Hehehe, the teachers were chasing us."

name: Kimika
message: "Well yeah, you tried to walk right out the front gate!"

name: Zakuro
message: "But Akasaka-san and Shiroyama-kun did that before, didn't they?"

name: Kimika
message: "B-But you're supposed to be a good student!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Not at all... I just couldn't decide anything by myself."

name: Zakuro
message: "I obeyed the rules just because someone else had decided them... But―"

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"
Just like Mamiya-kun had changed... there were a lot of things inside me that had changed...
The most important thing to me had changed...
Before, the most important thing to me was simply not upsetting anyone, but the person I was before had disappeared.
When did that happen? When I first started to like Mamiya-kun?
Mamiya-kun certainly did change me.
Mamiya-kun gave me the courage to move forward under my own power...
But, oddly enough, once I took that step... the wonderful future I had envisioned suddenly changed.
His form, which had been foremost in my mind, changed... once I took that step forward.
...This might be a rude way of saying it, but I didn't think he should be the most important thing in my life anymore.
Because he was splendid enough on his own. He had everything he needed on his own...
I didn't feel anything for him anymore.

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"

name: Zakuro
message: "What are you so scared of?"

name: Kimika
message: "Zakuro! Th-There are so many people around..."

name: Zakuro
message: "You don't need to worry about that... Mm..."

name: Kimika
message: "Mm, mm... ah, mm..."
When I took that step forward, the scenery changed.
The unusual became usual, and the usual became unusual.

name: Kimika
message: "What are you doing all of a sudden?"
Kimika complained, her eyes wet with tears.
Kimika is always like this...

name: Zakuro
message: "Would you rather I asked first?"

name: Kimika
message: "Th-That's not the problem!"

name: Kimika
message: "Jeez... I thought you were supposed to be a bullied girl. You're supposed to be the submissive one."

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm not a bullied girl anymore."

name: Kimika
message: "That's not what I mean!"

name: Kimika
message: "Mm, I thought you were a masochist, but I guess you were really a sadist."

name: Zakuro
message: "Hehehe... I don't know about that."

name: Zakuro
message: "After all, you were the one... that suddenly attacked me that day."

name: Kimika
message: "Th-That was―!"

name: Zakuro
message: "You didn't want Mamiya-kun to take me away from you?"

name: Kimika
message: "Th-That's, uh..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Jeez... You took my virginity just like that, and yet you get worked up about a kiss..."

name: Kimika
message: "Th-That was, uh... I was kind of desperate..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Desperate?"

name: Kimika
message: "Um, I just wanted to stop you from going off with him... and I got carried away..."

name: Zakuro
message: "You got carried away... and did it with me."

name: Kimika
message: "Ahhh!"
Kimika's face turned bright red as she turned away.

name: Zakuro
message: "Isn't that right?"

name: Kimika
message: "...I'm sorry."

name: Kimika
message: "Hey! What's this?!
Are you teasing me?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Not at all... I'm just asking you a question."

name: Kimika
message: "U-Ugh...
Zakuro, you're kind of a bully..."

name: Zakuro
message: "I'm not bullying you... If that's what you think I'm doing, would you rather I never kiss you again?"

name: Kimika
message: "Th-That's―!"

name: Zakuro
message: "That's what?"

name: Kimika
message: "Awww!"
Oh no... This again...

name: Kimika
message: "Jeez! I hate you! Go die, you piece of shit!"
Oh, now I've done it... She's so cute, I can't help but bully her...

name: Zakuro
message: "Ah, I'm sorry, Kimika!"
Ahaha... It's like the reverse of our relationship before.
People are funny...

name: Zakuro
message: "Ha, ha, ha... Kimika!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ha, ha, ha... Y-You're just as fast as ever, huh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "No... It's not that I'm fast, but rather... Well, more importantly, I'm sorry!"

name: Kimika
message: "...Zakuro."

name: Kimika
message: "Hey, how many times have we repeated this same pattern?!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahaha... I can't help bullying you sometimes. You're too cute."

name: Kimika
message: "How many times have I heard that excuse..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahaha... Sorry."

name: Kimika
message: "...Then promise me."

name: Zakuro
message: "Promise you what?"

name: Kimika
message: "Y-You won't bully me or say you won't kiss me anymore..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Heh!"

name: Kimika
message: "Whoa, don't hug me!"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yes, yes, I promise, Kimika!"

name: Kimika
message: "Whoa, what are you doing?! Are you trying to show off your boobs?"
A lot changed after that...
Every day was different.
Actually...
At the end, this happened...
That was July 19th... The last day before summer break.
At the end of the semester... I went up to the rooftop to talk to Mamiya-kun.
And when I got there...
Ah...

name: Ayana
message: Takashima... Zakuro-san?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Your name was..."

name: Ayana
message: "Otonashi Ayana..."
Oh, right... I think I've seen her before.

name: Ayana
message: "Did you come to see Mamiya Takuji-kun today?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Yeah... I did, but..."
How did she know that?

name: Ayana
message: "Mamiya-kun won't be coming to school today."

name: Zakuro
message: "Really? Did he catch a cold?"

name: Ayana
message: "He didn't catch a cold... Today is the day before the 20th."

name: Zakuro
message: "The day before the 20th?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes... Therefore, the two will have their final battle..."

name: Zakuro
message: "Their final battle?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. The Mamiya-kun from the underground room was supposed to be the victor, but... because of your choice, his soul has changed directions."

name: Zakuro
message: "His soul?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes... The world of souls. The repitition of souls..."

name: Ayana
message: "His soul's string has been severed from the repeating world's model... He's now fated to walk a different path."

name: Zakuro
message: "Um, what does that mean?"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe, it just means that you made the correct choice."

name: Ayana
message: "Everything is as desired... Takuji the Creator and Takuji the Destroyer died together, and Takuji the Harmonizer alone remained."

name: Ayana
message: "Everything is as he desired..."

name: Ayana
message: "...As Tomosane-kun desired."

name: Zakuro
message: "Tomosane-kun?"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe... The soul is endlessly reincarnated in the same world. That's why I'm here."

name: Ayana
message: "Now, you too must move forward. The promised land awaits you. The Wonderful Everyday is beginning."

name: Zakuro
message: "U-Um, do you know all of Mamiya-kun's secrets?"

name: Ayana
message: "Secrets?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Just now, you were talking about Mamiya-kun the Creator, Mamiya-kun the Destroyer, and Mamiya-kun the Harmonizer."

name: Zakuro
message: "What is that?!"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe... Yes, but the answer is not for you."

name: Ayana
message: "You've obtained The Wonderful Everyday, and you've lost everything besides..."

name: Ayana
message: "That's why you can't obtain that answer... Or maybe."
Ayana-san grinned.
I felt a chill run up my spine.

name: Ayana
message: "Would you like to give up all you have now?"

name: Ayana
message: "Would you like to see the soul take a different direction?"
I made my choice...

name: Zakuro
message: "I can't give up what I have now. I've sworn to live my life to the fullest!"

name: Ayana
message: "All right..."
Ayana-san gave another, smaller smile, and then looked at the sky.

name: Ayana
message: "That sky is no longer here."

name: Ayana
message: "The lost sky... The world of just one soul erased that sky."

name: Ayana
message: "The girl who has decided to live her life... has obtained The Wonderful Everyday."
I still don't know what she meant by that.
I never saw Ayana-san again after that.
I heard rumors that she had transferred or dropped out, but I never knew for sure.
To be honest... it seemed irrelevant to me.
The question I asked Ayana-san on that day...
Even that question seemed irrelevant to my life.

name: Kimika
message: "Hey... Zakuro."

name: Zakuro
message: "Eh?"

name: Kimika
message: "What's wrong?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, sorry..."

name: Kimika
message: "Lost in thought again... Jeez, Zakuro, you're always like that."

name: Zakuro
message: "Ahaha... Not at all."

name: Zakuro
message: "More importantly... summer is ending, huh..."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah... It's starting to get a bit chilly."

name: Zakuro
message: "The summer will end, fall will come, winter will come, and then it'll change to another warm spring."

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah..."
I walked through the chilly park.
I moved forward.

name: Kimika
message: "Huh? What's wrong?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Oh, no, it's nothing."
What is this feeling?
It's a strange unease, like I feel uncomfortable about something... It's really strange.

name: Kimika
message: "What's the hold up? Let's go."

name: Zakuro
message: "...Let's go."
Let's go.
When I heard her words, I understood.
I see... So that's what it was.
This feeling is probably the same feeling I felt when I took my first step.
I just forgot the feeling until now.
This is probably what my first step felt like.
It's not just me, either. Everyone felt this when they took their first step. It's the same feeling animals must have felt when they first started to walk on land.
I felt nervous about my first step.
There's no mistaking it.
After all, it's my first step...
It's the beginning of a new scenery.
But eventually that single step...
Becomes an everyday experience.
The single step into tomorrow that I so feared...
That was a common scene.
It became an everyday routine.
It became easy. It became incredibly normal.

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-What is it?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Nothing... Hey, Kimika."

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-What?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Thank you!"

name: Kimika
message: "Eh?"

name: Zakuro
message: "Thank you for walking by my side! Thank you for helping me take this step!"

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? Uh..."
Kimika hesitated... Of course she did. I was a bit too sudden. I've always been like that, though I never had the courage to say what I was thinking.
That's why she hesita...ted?

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah..."
Kimika laughed cheerfully as she responded.

name: Kimika
message: "Thank you, too."

name: Kimika
message: "For walking by my side!"
